description_long: This is a modern, upright rolling suitcase with a hard rectangular shape and a predominantly black exterior. It features a telescopic handle in metallic silver with a black grip, extending from the top for easy maneuvering. The front face displays two horizontal zippered pockets, providing quick-access storage for smaller items. Four green-accented wheels are attached at the base, allowing for smooth multidirectional movement. The main compartment is accessed via a zipper that runs along the perimeter of the front panel. The suitcase appears to be constructed from a combination of durable synthetic fabric and plastic, with reinforced corners and a sturdy build suitable for urban travel.
description: A black, rectangular rolling suitcase with a telescopic handle, two front zippered pockets, and four green-accented wheels. The design is modern and functional, ideal for urban travel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile, two green wheels, and the extended telescopic handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting two horizontal zippered pockets and the full width of the telescopic handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a visible side handle and two green wheels, no pockets visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel and the telescopic handle, with no pockets or side handles visible.
attribute_handle_type: telescopic top handle, fixed side handle
attribute_zipper_configuration: Three zipper tracks: one main compartment zipper (double zipper), two front pocket zippers (single zipper each)
